blended.narrative: Plattekill Mountain is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 12 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 47°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Thursday: 3.4" of snow, highs of 56°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 2.8" of snow, highs of 27°F. Expect powder.
